name: Neto By Maropost Release Notes – 23 Jun 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release notes covers the eCommerce releases "},{"text":"6.252.0","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"6.253","bold":true},{"text":", and "},{"text":"6.254","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Variation (Child) Products Visible on Sitemap","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you have set up your web store to show variation/child products as separate URLs, these variation products will now be included in the sitemap. Earlier, only standalone and parent products were included in the sitemap."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about sitemaps, see the ‘Set up XML sitemaps For Google’ section in "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Google-Search-Console-Setup","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Google Search Console Setup","bold":true}]},{"text":". And to learn about variation (child) products, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/add-variation-products","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Add Variation Products","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Continued Improvements for PayPal Cards","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Continued improvements for PayPal Cards around failed PayPal authorisation not releasing pre-authorisation amounts when transactions could not be completed."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Optimized Addon Scripts for Google Analytics 4 and PayPal - Pay In 4","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The addon scripts for Google Analytics 4 and PayPal - Pay In 4 have been optimized. The Google Analytics 4 script changes will help improve reporting the odd data. The PayPal - Pay In 4 script changes will help improve your web store performance."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about Google Analytics 4 addon, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/google-analytics-4","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Google Analytics 4","bold":true}]},{"text":" and to learn about PayPal - Pay In 4 addon, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/add-paypal-pay-in-4-to-your-webstore","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Add PayPal Pay in 4 to your Webstore","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Updated Hunter Express Postcodes and Zones","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Hunter Express postcodes and zones were updated to reflect the newest changes for June."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"   "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"FIXES","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the customer link when creating a new RMA was opening the Create New Customer page instead of linked customer details."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the password reset was throwing an error in specific circumstances."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with Direct Freight where special characters used in the receiver(shipping) address was being displayed incorrectly."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with StarTrack shipping where the tracking URL wasn’t showing the latest tracking information. The tracking URL on the StarTrack shipping consignment now shows the correct URL that reflects the latest tracking information."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the eBay re-listing process was optimized to improve the overall performance when re-listing an item on eBay. "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Deprecation","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=http%3A%2F%2Fstamped.io%2F","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Stamped.io","bold":true}]},{"text":" addon is no longer supported. If you wish to continue using the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2FStamped.io","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Stamped.io"}]},{"text":" platform, please refer to the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/stamped-io","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Stamped.io article","bold":true}]},{"text":" for setup-related instructions."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
